channel.title: Lakefront Leak & Drain Content Pipe
channel.description: Automated Plumbing Leads for Cleveland and Cuyahoga County

item.title: Why Cleveland Basements Flood
item.description: 🚨 CLEVELAND HOMEOWNERS: Is your basement ready for the spring thaw? Learn why local foundations fail and how to stay dry. 💧 #Cleveland #Plumbing

item.title: Signs Your Sump Pump Is Failing
item.description: Don't wait for a flood to find out your pump is dead. Listen for these 3 warning signs today! 🛠️ #CuyahogaCounty #HomeMaintenance

item.title: Preventing Clogs in Multifamily Buildings
item.description: 🏢 ATTN Property Managers: A single clog can ruin a whole stack. Here is your preventive maintenance checklist for Cleveland apartments.

item.title: Water Heater Leaks: Is It a Flood or a Flush?
item.description: 💧 Is that puddle around your tank a simple fix or a total replacement? We break down the warning signs for Cleveland basements. #PlumbingTips #Cleveland

item.title: Why Your Basement Smells Like Sewage
item.description: 🤢 Don't let sewer gas ruin your home's air quality. Learn how to identify dry traps and cracked vents in older Cuyahoga County homes. #HomeMaintenance #Cleveland

item.title: Commercial Hydro-Jetting vs. Snaking
item.description: 🏢 ATTN Cleveland Business Owners: Stop temporary fixes. Learn why hydro-jetting is the only way to fully clear grease and roots. #CommercialPlumbing #ClevelandBusiness

item.title: The Power of Camera Inspections
item.description: 📸 Stop guessing where the clog is. Our high-tech cameras see through the walls and underground to save you thousands in digging costs. #Tech #Plumbing

item.title: Post-Thaw Pipe Checkup
item.description: ❄️ The Cleveland freeze is over, but did your pipes survive? Check these 3 hidden spots for hairline fractures before they become major leaks. #SpringCleaning #Cleveland
